title: The Flaming Teenage
director: Charles Edwards, Irvin S. Yeaworth Jr.
actors: Noel Reyburn, Ethel Barrett, Jerry Franks
plot: A small town boy heads for the lights of the big city and discovers the delights of hard liquor and fast women. Ere long, he becomes an addict, a dope peddler and a shop-lifter to obtain money for drugs.
